channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Five killed in northern Germany shooting, police say
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Five killed in shooting at German youth centre
- Five killed in shooting at youth care centre in northern Germany
- Five dead in shooting at youth welfare centre in northern Germany
- 5 killed in shooting at German youth welfare center
- Five killed in shooting at German youth facility, police say
- Five killed in shooting at youth care centre in northern Germany
- Police say 5 killed, 2 arrested after shooting at German youth center
- At Least 5 Killed in Mass Shooting at Youth Center After Gunman Opens Fire
- Five killed in shooting in northern Germany, police say
- 5 Killed In Northern Germany Shooting, Police Say
- Five dead in shooting in northern Germany
- 5 Killed in Shooting at Youth Center in Northern Germany, Police Say
- Five dead in shooting at German youth welfare centre: police
- Five killed in shooting at youth welfare centre in Germany’s Stade
- 5 die in Germany shooting at welfare centre, 2 people arrested
- Five dead in shooting at German youth welfare centre: police
- Five dead in shooting at youth welfare centre in northern Germany
- Shooter kills five adults at youth welfare facility in Stade, Germany
- 5 Killed in Shooting at Youth Center in Northern Germany, Police Say
- Five dead in shooting at German youth welfare centre: Police
- 5 killed in shooting in German youth welfare facility; 2 suspects detained]]>

item.title: Trump says Iran sought meeting, but Tehran denies any talks are scheduled

Matched Titles:
- Iran war live: Tehran denies Trump’s claim of meeting in Doha

- 'No negotiation at any level': Iran refutes Donald Trump's claim of planned US talks in Doha
- Trump claims Iran has agreed to hold peace talks in Doha after recent clashes
- Trump says Iran meeting to be held tomorrow in Doha
- Trump says US-Iran meeting scheduled for Tuesday in Doha
- Trump says Iran requested meeting, but Iranian officials say nothing scheduled
- Urgent: Trump says Iran requested a meeting in Doha on Tuesday, Iran says no meeting soon
- Trump says Iran has requested a meeting, but Iranian officials say nothing has been scheduled]]>

item.title: US Supreme Court rejects Trump's unprecedented bid to fire Fed's Cook
item.description:

- 'President failed to…': US Supreme Court blocks Trump's bid to fire Fed governor Lisa Cook

- Supreme Court blocks Trump’s bid to fire US Federal Reserve’s Lisa Cook
- US Supreme Court rejects Trump’s unprecedented bid to fire Fed governor Lisa Cook
- Supreme Court expands Trump’s power to fire officials, but protects Fed Governor Lisa Cook
- US Supreme Court expands presidential powers, backs Trump's firing; Fed's Lisa Cook spared for now
- Supreme Court blocks Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook
- Supreme Court blocks Trump from sacking Fed governor Lisa Cook
- US supreme court rules Trump’s firing of Lisa Cook from Fed was unconstitutional]]>
